description:
Every Dutch public tender, with the sub-threshold long tail that EU TED never sees, in a local-first CLI you can pipe.

TenderNed is the Dutch national public procurement platform run by PIANOo / Ministerie van EZK. Every Dutch contracting authority must publish above- and below-threshold tender notices here. Above-threshold notices are forwarded to EU TED; the sub-threshold long tail (€40k–€220k) is TenderNed-only.

This CLI covers the unauthenticated TNS publication webservice (search/list/filter publications, document download, contracting-authority directory, RSS feed) and the Basic-auth eForms XML endpoint. Data is CC-0 public domain.

tools.name: buyers_get
tools.description: Fetch one contracting authority by ID. Required: aanbestedendedienstId. Returns the Buyer.

tools.name: buyers_list
tools.description: List Dutch contracting authorities (paginated). Optional: page, size. Returns the BuyerPage.

tools.name: docs_download
tools.description: Download all documents for one publication as a zip archive. Required: publicatieId. Returns the BinaryContent.

tools.name: docs_get
tools.description: Download a single document's binary content (PDF/Word/etc.). Required: publicatieId, documentId. Returns the BinaryContent.

tools.name: docs_list
tools.description: List attached documents for one publication. Required: publicatieId. Returns the DocumentList.

tools.name: notices_get
tools.description: Fetch full structured metadata for one publication. Required: publicatieId. Returns the Publication.

tools.name: notices_list
tools.description: Search and list tender publications with rich filters (CPV, dates, buyer, procedure, scope). Optional: search, cpvCodes, publicatieType (plus 11 more). Returns the PublicationPage.

params.name: search
params.description: Full-text keyword search across title and description

params.name: cpvCodes
params.description: CPV code in 8-digit-plus-check-digit form (e.g. 45000000-7). Repeat for multi-CPV intersection.

params.name: publicatieType
params.description: Publication type filter (AAO=open call, AGO=awarded, VOP=prior info, RVO=cancellation, WNO=ex-ante, MAC=market consultation, REC=rectification)

params.name: procedure
params.description: Procedure code (Openbaar, Niet-openbaar, Onderhandeling, Concurrentiegerichte dialoog, etc.)

params.name: nationaalOfEuropees
params.description: Scope: NA=national-only (sub-threshold), EU=European (above-threshold). National-only notices never reach TED.

params.name: buyer-id
params.description: Filter by contracting-authority UUID (use 'buyers list' to find IDs)
